rows.label: qev060203_MSG0001
rows.name:
Pulling a prank like this at a time
when we all need to unite and overcome
this difficult situation together...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0002
rows.name:
I don't know who they are, but
honestly... what are they thinking...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_JNK0010
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev060203_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask about the prank.

rows.label: qev060203_JNK0020
rows.name: Inform

rows.label: qev060203_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell him that the Voltant was stolen.

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0003
rows.name:
You see... BLADE Headquarters received a
warning of an impending attack from a guy
calling himself the "Light of Judgment".[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0004
rows.name:
He sent in a wildly chaotic message,
but simply put, he claimed he's going
to massacre all the citizens of NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0005
rows.name:
Well, it doesn't seem like an
organized crime, so I assume
it's just a prank, but still...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Wait, what!? The Voltant the
Zaruboggan collected was stolen!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hey! Then that warning... There's
a high chance it's the real deal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0008
rows.name:
What...! The Voltant the
Zaruboggan collected was stolen!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0009
rows.name:
Hey, hey, are you serious! Dots
that absolutely shouldn't
connect have just connected![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0010
rows.name:
...You see, earlier, BLADE Headquarters
received a warning from a guy calling
himself the "Light of Judgment"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0011
rows.name:
He's going to massacre the citizens of NLA...
or so he says! It's such an outlandish story
that I thought it was a prank, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0012
rows.name:
Damn it... Then that warning... There's
a high chance it's the real deal![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0013
rows.name:
...What? You're looking
for the culprit too?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0014
rows.name:
Alright... Then listen to this statement
of intent. It might serve as a clue.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0015
rows.name:
"I am currently at the headwaters of
all life. Incompetent members of
BLADE, try and find me if you can."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0016
rows.name:
"If you fail to find me, a grand judgment
will fall upon everyone, and NLA will
transform into a city of the dead."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0017
rows.name:
...That's what he said! It seems
we are in a race against time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0018
rows.name:
Let's split up and search for the culprit!
Damn it! The headwaters of all life...
Where the hell is that supposed to be!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0019
rows.name:
What's wrong? Did you forget the
statement of intent? ...Then I'll
read it to you one more time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0020
rows.name:
"I am currently at the headwaters of
all life. Incompetent members of
BLADE, try and find me if you can."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0021
rows.name:
"If you fail to find me, a grand judgment
will fall upon everyone, and NLA will
transform into a city of the dead."[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0022
rows.name:
That's what he said... Damn it...
Where the hell is this "headwaters
of all life" he's at...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0023
rows.name:
The Light of Judgment... that bastard
Homer actually turned himself in! You're
the one who convinced him, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0024
rows.name:
He seemed to have had a serious change
of heart, but what kind of negotiation
did you use to move him like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0025
rows.name:
The Light of Judgment... that bastard Homer
actually turned himself in, but... He's
acting incredibly apathetic about it all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060203_MSG0026
rows.name:
What in the world happened? Did something
totally chaotic go down or what?[ST:wait ]
